channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Why odds of SpaceX merger with Tesla keep climbing every time the stock shoots up
item.description: But a giant leap for Tesla shareholders could be a rotten move for SpaceX investors.

item.title: Despite All The Smack Talk, Tesla Copied BYD
item.description: Tesla fans criticized BYD electric vehicles for years. Supposedly, they were cheap, boring, and poorly made. However, BYD has grown and grown over the past several years, now produces far more cars than Tesla, and has about the same number of R&D engineers as Tesla has total employees.

item.title: Bernie Sanders vs. Elon Musk: Would Taxing the Rich Actually Save Social Security?
item.description: Senator Bernie Sanders fired off a single sentence on X this month that frames the entire fight over how to keep Social Security solvent: “Today, Elon Musk, a trillionaire, pays the same amount into Social Security as someone making $184,500.” The Vermont independent paired the post with a bill h...

item.title: Wall Street expects Tesla rival to surge 90% despite cash crunch
item.description: Lucid Group has not had an easy stretch. The stock has been battered, and the losses keep piling up. But Wall Street thinks the sell-off is overdone.

item.title: If You'd Invested $10,000 in Tesla 10 Years Ago, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
item.description: The market continues to buy the story that this is an AI, autonomous driving, and robotics enterprise.

item.title: Podcast: we drive Aptera’s solar car, Tesla Cybercab specs revealed, Lucid Cosmos design leaks, and more
item.description: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Jamie’s first drive in Aptera’s solar car, Tesla Cybercab specs revealed, Lucid Cosmos design leak, and more.

item.title: Cathie Wood Makes Bold Tesla Bet, Dumps $77 Million in Roku Shares
item.description: Cathie Wood Snaps Up $35 Million in Snowflake, Slashes Roku Stake

item.title: Tesla gives its biggest signal yet that Cybercab launch is imminent
item.description: Tesla just gave what is perhaps its biggest signal yet that the launch of the Cybercab, its autonomous ride-hailing-geared car, is imminent. The Cybercab has been spotted outside of Gigafactory Texas in massive numbers over the past few days, with hundreds of units being stored on property just d...

item.title: Rivian's CEO Is Taking On Elon Musk In Humanoid Robots
item.description: Rivian Automotive Inc. CEO RJ Scaringe has a plan to put robots on factory floors. He also has $1 billion to back it up.

item.title: Elon Musk challenges Tesla credit rating from Moody’s after SpaceX gets a higher one
item.description: Elon Musk has publicly questioned Moody’s credit assessments following the rating agency’s decision to assign SpaceX a Baa1 investment-grade rating, two notches above Tesla’s Baa3. The comments came amid discussions comparing the two companies’ financial profiles. SpaceX earned its first-time Baa...

item.title: Who's Winning The Robotaxi Race? It's... Complicated
item.description: Every time we think we understand the robotaxi market, another bit of news shakes things up. This week, we got updates from Tesla, Uber, Waymo, Wayve, and Lucid.

item.title: Portable power: new Mitsubishi eK Cross pairs 1500 W plug with sub-$12K price
item.description: Mitsubishi’s Kei-class eK Cross gets a mild facelift for the 2027 model year that combines a body-color front fascia and updated interior tech to give it a fresh look – but the big news is a new 100 V AC power outlet that can draw up to 1500 Watts.

item.title: Tesla Faces Fresh FSD Roadblock in Europe
item.description: Regulators question supervised self-driving speed behavior

item.title: Tesla Gets Cathie Wood Boost as Ark Returns After SpaceX Buy
item.description: Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest funds reiterated their faith in Elon Musk—buying back into Tesla after selling shares last week in a move that looked like it was making room for SpaceX’s mega IPO. A trading notice revealed on Thursday it added 54,815 shares across its ARK Innovation ETF—where the el...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Gets Approval for its Full Self-Driving (FSD) Technology in Denmark
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 10 best electric and autonomous driving stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On June 11, Tesla Inc.

item.title: The Mag 7 Is Irrelevant as the SpaceX Era Begins
item.description: What’s the point of the Magnificent Seven? Investors are wondering if the group still makes following SpaceX’s stellar debut.

item.title: Tesla Hits EU Speed Bump
item.description: Sweden is pushing back on Tesla's self-driving rollout over speed limit concerns.

item.title: Cathie Wood Rotates Into Tesla and Snowflake
item.description: ARK shifts exposure toward growth and cloud

item.title: SpaceX Has a Rapidly Approaching $20 Billion Surprise for Its Shareholders -- and They're Not Going to Be Happy
item.description: A sizable chunk of SpaceX's $75 billion initial public offering (IPO) capital raise is already spoken for.

item.title: Just 4 "Magnificent Seven" Stocks Are Still More Valuable Than SpaceX. Could SpaceX Be a Better Buy Than All of Them?
item.description: SpaceX wasted no time surpassing Amazon, Meta Platforms, and Tesla in market cap.

item.title: The SpaceX Era Is Making the Magnificent Seven Irrelevant
item.description: What’s the point of the Magnificent Seven? Investors are wondering if the group still makes following SpaceX’s stellar debut.

item.title: SpaceX lands investment-grade credit ratings as shares tumble from record high
item.description: SpaceX has been awarded investment-grade credit ratings by all three major agencies just days after its record stock market debut, even as its newly listed shares slid sharply on Thursday.View on euronews

item.title: 90% of Amazon's Portfolio Is Invested in This EV Stock (Hint: It's Not Tesla)
item.description: Can Rivian bounce back from its terrible performance this year?

item.title: Elon Musk says he is adding a voice interface to full self-driving while regulators investigate it for missed hazards
item.description: Elon Musk said Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) owners will soon be able to speak to Grok, the AI assistant from xAI, as if the car is a chauffeur. Commands like "turn right here" and "drop at the entrance first, then park far away" will be voice-activated instead of requiring touchscreen input or...

item.title: Tim Draper Says Elon Musk Made The World See SpaceX Differently Just Like He Did With Tesla And PayPal: 'Opened Our Minds…'
item.description: Venture capitalist Tim Draper praised SpaceX’s (NASDAQ:SPCX) record initial public offering as a defining moment for Elon Musk and private innovation, saying the listing showed how founders can force industries to imagine a different future. Draper Says Musk Revived Transportation And Space "My t...

item.title: Goldman Sachs Just Upgraded Its Tesla EV Delivery Forecast: Here's What Really Matters
item.description: Tesla is set for an excellent second quarter of EV deliveries, according to Wall Street, but investors should also keep an eye on developments in its long-term growth initiatives.

item.title: Does a SpaceX and Tesla Merger Make Sense? Here's What Investors Should Know
item.description: One Musk-led mega company isn't an absurd idea.

item.title: Volvo just made public EV charging a lot less annoying
item.description: Volvo EX90 drivers in the US can now charge at public charging networks, including Superchargers and IONNA DC fast chargers, without opening an app or pulling out a credit card.

item.title: Tesla HW3 claim grows to 7,000 owners, gets law firm backing for collective action
item.description: The Dutch collective claim against Tesla over broken “Full Self-Driving” promises on Hardware 3 vehicles has reached nearly 7,000 verified participants and secured backing from law firm Kennedy Van der Laan for a formal legal action. The initiative, which launched in April with 3,000 signups in i...

item.title: SpaceX Shares Are Hot. This Looming Event Could Derail Them.
item.description: The aftermath of SpaceX’s public offering saw the shows soar, in part because of demand outstripping supply. But that could soon end as a staggered release of lockups makes more shares available.

item.title: Heavy SpaceX Options Trading Driven by New Weekly Contracts
item.description: Trading in SpaceX options remained heavy Thursday, their third day since the options launch. As of 1 p.m. ET, 1.26 million SpaceX options had traded, about equally divided between calls and puts.

item.title: TSLA Stock: Major Roadblock For Tesla FSD As Sweden Reportedly Opposes EU-Wide Approval
item.description: The Swedish Transport Administration (TRV) sent a letter dated April 30 to the EU’s Technical Committee on Motor Vehicles (TCMV), urging rejection of FSD in its current form, reported Reuters.

item.title: Goldman Sachs Says SpaceX Could Hit $474 Billion in Revenue by 2030. Here Are the 3 AI Stocks That Benefit Most.
item.description: Nvidia, Alphabet, and Tesla could all benefit from SpaceX's artificial intelligence (AI) ambitions.

item.title: Some Call SpaceX A Meme Stock. PitchBook Sees An AI Infrastructure Boom.
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX pulled off the biggest IPO ever. For investors, there are still issues to sort out. For one, is SPCX a meme stock?

item.title: Tesla faces Full Self-Driving pushback in EU over ‘speeding’
item.description: A new report from Reuters claims that a transport authority in Sweden is pushing back against the approval of Tesla’s Full Self-Driving suite because it will travel over speed limits. The report says the Swedish Transport Administration (TRV) recommends the European Union votes against FSD’s appr...

item.title: Safeguards For How To Invest In The SpaceX IPO And Beyond
item.description: As SpaceX and Deep Fission go public and Anthropic and OpenAI look to follow, learn these rules for how to invest in IPO stocks.

item.title: Sweden tells EU to reject Tesla ‘FSD’ unless speeding is removed
item.description: Sweden’s transport authority has told the European Union it should vote against approving Tesla’s “Full Self-Driving (Supervised)” across the bloc unless the system’s ability to exceed posted speed limits is removed. The recommendation, in a previously unreported April 30 letter to the EU’s Techn...

item.title: Tesla teases greater Grok FSD integration and ‘Banish’ feature ‘in about 3 months’
item.description: Tesla is going to let you guide Full Self-Driving with Grok in 3 months, CEO Elon Musk confirmed on X. The response from Musk, which revealed Tesla plans to allow drivers to effectively control the car and its navigation more explicitly using Grok, puts the feature for about September. A Tesla ow...

item.title: Tesla teases new FSD features — but it’s still not the self-driving promised
item.description: Elon Musk says Tesla’s Full Self-Driving will soon remember your parking preferences and let you talk to it through Grok, like giving directions to an Uber driver. The features sound useful, and they reflect how genuinely impressive FSD has become — but they also underscore that it remains a supe...

item.title: Tesla Cybercab has one important piece that AI4 cars might need for FSD
item.description: A close-up image of a Cybercab engineering vehicle in Peabody, Massachusetts, reveals a compact triangular side repeater camera housing equipped with an integrated washer mechanism. This seemingly small hardware addition could prove to be one of the most critical components for achieving reliable...

item.title: Tesla loses its head of quality to Stellantis
item.description: Tesla’s head of quality, Kahiree Gans, is leaving the automaker to return to Stellantis — the same company Tesla poached him from less than three years ago. Gans has updated his LinkedIn profile to list his new role as “Vice President, Global SQD” at Stellantis, while describing himself as “Ex-Te...

item.title: Your Tesla Drives Better Than You Do—and That’s Good News for the Stock
item.description: BofA analyst Alexander Perry recently analyzed safety y data for Waymo and Tesla. Serious incidents are very rare.

item.title: Waymo Has a Tesla-Like Recall. What It Means for Alphabet Stock.
item.description: Waymo is recalling 3,871 robo-taxis to correct software that might allow a vehicle to enter a freeway construction zone, according to a National Highway Traffic Safety Administration notice. For starters, it illustrates the size of the Waymo robo-taxi fleet. The Alphabet -owned ride-hailing net...

item.title: SpaceX Looks Like Meme Stock To Some. Is That A Good Or Bad Thing?
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX pulled off the biggest IPO ever. For investors, there are still issues to sort out. For one, is SPCX a meme stock?

item.title: Tesla And SpaceX Are Converging - And The Market Hasn't Caught Up
Tesla Grows Relatively Stronger In A Stagnant, Post-Incentive U.S. BEV Market
Could SpaceX Join the "Magnificent Seven"?
item.description: SpaceX has quickly become a trillion-dollar company.

item.title: Will Tesla Be Acquired by SpaceX? And Does That Make Tesla Stock a Buy?
item.description: There is speculation that SpaceX will acquire Tesla within the next year.

item.title: SpaceX Can Be Added to the Russell 1000 and Russell 3000 After Today -- Don't Take the Bait
item.description: The rewriting of several major index inclusion criteria has set retail investors up to be fleeced.

item.title: The Rivian R2 Matches The Tesla Model Y On Efficiency, Despite Weighing More
item.description: Rivian’s R2 Performance is roughly 500 pounds heavier than Tesla’s go-fast crossover, yet the energy consumption is identical.
